//: Merged (not overwritten) into .claude/settings.json by the installer (pack.yaml: merge: true). Adds Python/uv-specific tool permissions on top of the core file. Checked against kit/settings.json on 2026-07-16: the core carries dotnet/git/gh entries and NO Python entries, so nothing here is a duplicate. The split is by BLAST RADIUS, not by tool: read-only, test, and lint invocations are allowed; anything that mutates the dependency set, the lockfile, or publishes is asked. Deny stays empty on purpose — deny is the core's job, and this pack has no Python-specific destructive command to add to it. Note the allowed `uv` forms are the pinned ones (--frozen / --locked): they cannot silently re-resolve dependencies, which is exactly why they are safe to run unattended.
